what.description: A destination tag or memo is a unique identifier that helps ensure a cryptocurrency deposit is credited to the correct recipient. It's usually required when sending funds to services or exchanges that use shared wallet addresses.
what.title: What is a destination tag or memo?

where.description: It is typically a unique identifying string that can be found in your recipient account information.
where.title: Where can I find mine?

why.description: The destination token is identified as requiring additional identifying information in order to be properly delivered. Please make sure you provide this additional information to guarantee a successful swap.
why.title: Why do I need one?

accountSelection.description: First select the wallet, then the account
accountSelection.title: Select a account

dateSelection.description: You need to select the dates to filter the transactions.
dateSelection.title: Select the dates

backupAlert.description1: Backing up your wallet is a precautionary and crucial step in managing your assets.
backupAlert.description2: Having a back up will prevent you from losing your funds in the event of losing your phone or otherwise not being able to access this app.
backupAlert.description3: To back up simply close this panel, click the 3 dots at the top right of the screen and select Back up wallet. You will then be guided through the quick process.
backupAlert.title: Wallet backup

buyAndSellTokensAboutData.description: Our on/off ramp partner only keeps an ID reference to your data and uses the email you provide to update you about your sales and purchases.
buyAndSellTokensAboutData.info: COZ doesn't store any of your data

sumsub.description: Your KYC data is encrypted and used by our KYC partner:

buyAndSellTokensAboutData.title: About your data

unlimit.description: All other data is handled by our on/ off ramp partner:

buyAndSellTokensAccounts.description: Copy the address of the account you want your purchased tokens to go into:

labels.emptyList: There are no wallets, create a wallet and try again

buyAndSellTokensAccounts.title: Your accounts

buyAndSellTokensInfo.aboutData: <1>This process uses an embedded widget.</1> When buying and selling tokens, some personal data might be requested for KYC purposes. <2>Larger transactions require a greater amount of KYC data.</2>

buyTokens.alert: Ensure that the selected account is compatible with your purchased token network!
buyTokens.description: <1>Once the KYC process is complete:</1> You will need to provide a destination address for your tokens. From the 'Wallets & Accounts' panel, copy the destination address of your desired Neon account.
buyTokens.title: Buying tokens

buyAndSellTokensInfo.description: Buy and sell tokens without relying on an exchange! Neon provides an effortless and secure way to buy and sell digital assets using fiat money.

sellTokens.alert: Deposit transactions need to be sent from the <1>same address</1> used in the widget!
sellTokens.description: <1>Once the KYC process is complete:</1> You will need to send your tokens to the deposit address using the ‘Make a Deposit’ button.  Please ensure that you transfer the correct amount of tokens to the deposit address! You can also copy a destination address of your desired Neon account, from the 'Wallets & Accounts' panel.
sellTokens.observation: After the transfers have been completed, your new tokens will take a few moments to arrive.
sellTokens.title: Selling tokens

buyAndSellTokensInfo.title: Buying & selling tokens

changelog.thankYouText: Thank you for choosing Neon Wallet Mobile. Feel free to reach us through any of our public channels, so we can continue to improve it together!
changelog.title: Changelog

scopes.CalledByEntry: Your signature can only be used by the calling contract and just for this transaction.
scopes.CustomContracts: Your signature can be used by the set of contracts listed above.
scopes.CustomGroups: Your signature can be used by the set of groups listed above.
scopes.Global: Your signature can be used without restriction with any contract.
scopes.None: Your signature is only valid for fee payments.
scopes.WitnessRules: Your signature is only valid for transactions that match the specified rules and conditions, such as the current script hash, group, or calling script hash. This allows for more complex and expressive signature scoping to address edge cases and potential reentrance attacks.

hideFraudulentToken.text: If you hide a token, it will only be removed from your wallet's view. No on-chain action is executed.

importBackup.description1: In the event that you lose access to you wallet, you can import it from a local backup file. Simply locate your local backup file and enter the password you used when you created the backup file and your access will be restored.
importBackup.description2: To start, locate your backup file:

neo3NeoXBridgeAbout.description: Easily bridge your crypto assets between networks, without ever leaving your wallet.
neo3NeoXBridgeAbout.explanation: Blockchains are independent of each other, and can’t interact with each other - That's where bridges come in. It’s similar in principle to exchanging money while traveling to different countries, a bridge allows you to transfer assets across various blockchains.
neo3NeoXBridgeAbout.neonAdvantage: Directly and immediately bridging tokens in NEON is convenient and allows you to save time and pay lower fees.
neo3NeoXBridgeAbout.title: About bridging tokens
neo3NeoXBridgeAbout.warningLabel: COZ are not maintainers of this bridging process - Neo Global Development is the maintainer.

neo3NeoXBridgeConfirmation.description: Please review the details below and confirm that you’d like to proceed.
neo3NeoXBridgeConfirmation.title: Confirm your bridge

neo3VoteCandidateDetails.insufficientGasDescription: Transfer GAS to this account, or change account to proceed.

neo3VoteCandidateDetails.title: About this candidate
neo3VoteCandidateDetails.voteAlreadyCastButtonLabel: Vote already cast for this candidate!

neo3VoteConfirmation.holderDescription: As a token holder, you can influence important protocol decisions so the network has a development path that matches community interests.

messages.voteError: There was an error to vote, try again, please

voteFailureNotification.previewBody: We couldn't verify the completion of your vote
voteFailureNotification.title: Vote failed

voteSuccessNotification.previewBody: Your vote has been completed successfully
voteSuccessNotification.title: Vote completed

neo3VoteConfirmation.systemDescription: Detailed proposal research and smart voting practices matter greatly. The system uses reliable verification and clear processes that let individuals meaningfully contribute to the NEO ecosystem’s growth and development.
neo3VoteConfirmation.title: Review & confirm your vote

voteErrorMessages.canNotPayGasFeeLabel: You can't pay the GAS fee
voteErrorMessages.noNeoLabel: You don't have enough NEO to vote with this Neo 3 account
voteErrorMessages.watchAccountLabel: Your Neo 3 account is in watching mode

neo3VoteHowItWorks.alertLabel: If you sell your NEO, your votes will be reduced by the number you have sold and your GAS reward will reduce proportionately too
neo3VoteHowItWorks.explanationLabel: The number of NEO you hold equates to the number of votes you can cast to vote for a candidate.
neo3VoteHowItWorks.noteDescription: By not voting, you miss will out on this benefit.
neo3VoteHowItWorks.title: How does it work?
neo3VoteHowItWorks.whyVoteDescription: By voting, you’re actively participating in the NEO ecosystem and are subsequently eligible to receive GAS as a holder’s benefit.

neo3VoteSupportUs.aboutNeonWalletDescription: As a Neon Wallet user and token holder, you can influence important protocol decisions so the network has a development path that matches your interests.
neo3VoteSupportUs.importantThingsLabel: Detailed proposal research and smart voting practices matter greatly.
neo3VoteSupportUs.scanOurWebsite: If you don’t know who we are, please take a moment to check <1>our website</1>.
neo3VoteSupportUs.title: Fancy supporting us?
neo3VoteSupportUs.youCanSupportUsLabel: If you like using Neon or any of our other products, you may want to support us with your vote to help drive our development.
